title: Mubadala Capital to acquire Pierre et Vacances’ outstanding securities in cash offer
summary: PJT Partners acted as sole financial advisor to the Abu Dhabi investor
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Beautiful aerial view of the Abu Dhabi downtown residential area, capturing the city beach and the city skyline. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ EXTREME-PHOTOGRAPHER

PJT Partners acted as sole financial advisor to the Abu Dhabi investor

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

Mubadala Capital, the alternative asset management subsidiary of Abu Dhabi sovereign investor Mubadala Investment Company, has signed a tender offer agreement with French leisure operator Pierre et Vacances to acquire its outstanding securities through an all-cash offer.
